prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第15名，近年排名持续上升（2021年第17→2026年第15），稳居全国顶尖工科强校行列；2026年声誉数据中东南大学未列入，2023年曾因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，但影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第31（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度较高；未 见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共18个，其中A+学科5个（建筑学、土木工程、交通运输工程、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），与招生专业 高度关联，对工科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业社会热度均为高热推荐或推荐，持续吸引高分考生；广东省2026 年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年（44.0万）增加约3.6%，竞争基数扩大；东南大学位于江苏南京，非本省高校；广东省考生 对省外顶尖985高校报考意愿较强，近年位次持续前移印证了这一点。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5212 → 5005 → 4580 → 2701 → 2232, showing a continuous and rapid upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition). Over the past 4 years, the ranking has moved forward by about 2980 places, with a baseline of approximately 2232 in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 82, 81, 78, 77, and 79 respectively, remaining stable within the 78–82 range. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 86, an increase of about 8.9% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 15th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 17th in 2021 to 15th in 2026), firmly among the top engineering powerhouses in the country. In the 2026 reputation data, Southeast University was not listed; in 2023, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, but the impact was limited. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 31st (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating high application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Architecture, Civil Engineering, Transportation Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, and Electronic Science and Technology), which are highly correlated with the enrollment majors and strongly attract engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended or recommended in terms of social popularity, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025 (440,000), expanding the competition base. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university. Candidates from Guangdong Province have a strong willingness to apply to top 985 universities outside the province, as evidenced by the continuous forward movement of rankings in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2232, an enrollment expansion of about 8.9% in 2026 (alleviating competition), an increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong (intensifying competition), the continuous improvement of the school's level (15th in Soft Science), and the high popularity of core engineering majors, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. However, the school's high popularity and the appeal of advantageous disciplines make it difficult for the ranking to drop significantly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2331, with a range of 2065–2597.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2065–2597, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Electronic Information Class, Intelligent Manufacturing, Smart Energy), use Tier 1 Wu Jianxiong Class as a reach, and Tier 3 Computer Class and Integrated Circuit as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2065), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 and popular Tier 2 majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 15th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years and strong overall strength; Southeast University is not listed in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 31st (relatively popular), with overall attention at an upper-middle level; History Category has few majors and a small enrollment plan, making rankings susceptible to single-year fluctuations; Law A-, Management Science and Engineering A- are related to the Liberal Arts Experimental Class, but Southeast University is known for engineering, with few History Category majors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1682nd place, the substantial enrollment expansion of about 66.7% in 2026 (significantly alleviating competition), the increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees (intensifying competition), and the small enrollment plan base causing large ranking fluctuations, the expansion effect far exceeds the examinee increase effect, but the high university level and limited History Category major options prevent the ranking from shifting too far back.
